===================
===================
=== infos.txt
===================
===================
===================
Autzen Stadium
Eugene, Oregon
19 July 1987

1.Maggie's Farm
2.Dead Man, Dead Man
3.Watching The River Flow
4.Simple Twist Of Fate
5.The Ballad Of Frankie Lee And Judas Priest
6.Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
7.Heart Of Mine
8.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
9.Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
10.Queen Jane Approximately
11.Ballad Of A Thin Man
12.Highway 61 Revisited
13.Tangled Up In Blue

14.Touch Of Grey (Robert Hunter/Jerry Garcia)  (missing)
15.All Along The Watchtower   (missing)

Concert #4 with The Grateful Dead. 1987 concert #4.

Bob Dylan (vocal, harmonica), Jerry Garcia (guitar, steel guitar, slide guitar), Bob Weir (guitar, vocal), Phil Lesh (bass), Brent Mydland (keyboards), Bill Kreutzmann & Mickey Hart (drums).

2, 6, 10, 13 backup vocals by Jerry Garcia and Bob Weir.
14 Jerry Garcia vocal and Bob Dylan back-up guitar.

 

Note.
 First live performance of Dead Man, Dead Man since New Orleans, Louisiana, 10 November 1981.
 First live performance of Watching The River Flow since Norman, Oklahoma, 23 November 1978.
 The Ballad Of Frankie Lee And Judas Priest, It's All Over Now, Baby Blue and Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35 was selected for release on the Grateful Deads version of DYLAN & THE DEAD

Bootlegs
Bob Dylan with the Grateful Dead Live Vol 2 Unauthorized. Joker Productions / JOK-040-B.
Bridgets Album (Bob Dylan & The Grateful Dead). Pharting Pharao LP.
Dylan, Dead, Live Up To Legend. LP.
In The Heart Of Oregon. Flamingo Records FR010.
Mad Mystic Hammering. B & W Records LP.
Together Were Strong. Archive Series LP.
Unreleased Live Album. Moonlight Records ML 9636.

Official releases
10 released on DYLAN & THE DEAD, CBS 463 381 2, 6 February 1989.
10 released in remastered version on DYLAN & THE DEAD, Columbia 88691924312-34 as part of the CD box THE COMPLETE ALBUM COLLECTION, VOL. ONE, 5 November 2013.

8 new songs (53%) compared to previous concert. 5 new songs for this tour.

Stereo PA recording, 90 minutes.

Session info updated 22 November 2013.

www.bjorner.com

CDR trade > XLD > flac
apa05
